title: S + used to + V（過去習慣）

formulas.zh: 主詞過去經常/曾經做某事，現在不再如此
過去是否經常做某事的疑問句形式

explanation: used to 表達過去的習慣、經常性動作或已不存在的狀態，強調現在已改變。結構上，used to 後接原形動詞。否定形式為 didn't use to 或 used not to（較正式）。疑問句為 Did S use to V?。注意與 be used to + -ing（習慣於）區別：前者談過去習慣已改變，後者指現在已習慣某事。used to 通常需搭配過去時間副詞如 when I was young、in my childhood 等，以突顯時間對比。

examples.eng: I used to play basketball every day when I was in high school.
examples.chi: 我高中時曾經每天打籃球。

examples.eng: She used to be afraid of heights, but now she enjoys rock climbing.
examples.chi: 她曾經害怕高度，但現在她喜歡攀岩。

examples.eng: Did you use to live in Taipei before moving to Kaohsiung?
examples.chi: 你搬到高雄前曾經住在台北嗎？

examples.eng: My grandfather didn't use to have a smartphone, but he learns it now.
examples.chi: 我爺爺過去沒有用過智慧型手機，但現在他在學。

extension.tip: 區別 used to 與 be used to：used to + V 談過去習慣已改變；be used to + -ing 談已習慣某事（現在仍持續）。另與 would 區別：would 表過去重複動作但無「現在改變」含義。used to 適合談習慣、狀態、職業等過去特徵。

examples.result: → 我曾經抽菸（現在不抽了）
→ 我習慣於抽菸（現在仍在抽）

examples.test: He would visit me every weekend.
examples.result: → 他過去每週末來訪（無現在對比意涵）

extension.note: 記住：used to = 過去的習慣或狀態，重點在「現在已改變」；be used to = 已習慣，強調「現在適應」。

parts: go to the library every Saturday, but now I prefer studying at home.
exercises.sentence: I used to go to the library every Saturday, but now I prefer studying at home.
exercises.translation: 我曾經每週六去圖書館，但現在我更喜歡在家裡讀書。

exercises.sentence: Did you use to drink coffee before sleeping?

parts: make homemade bread, but she is too busy now.
exercises.sentence: My mother used to make homemade bread, but she is too busy now.
exercises.translation: 我媽媽曾經做自製麵包，但她現在太忙了。

parts: eat meat, but they are vegetarian now.
exercises.sentence: They did not use to eat meat, but they are vegetarian now.
exercises.translation: 他們過去不吃肉，但他們現在是素食者。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的過去習慣表達方式
mc_exercises.question_eng: When I was a child, I _______ go to the beach every summer with my family.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A。used to + 原形動詞表示過去習慣性動作，現在已改變。B 項 am used to 是現在式被動，表示「習慣於」，語意不符。C 項 use to 缺少 d，文法錯誤。D 項 was used to 為過去被動，亦不符合過去習慣的表達。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 判斷過去習慣的疑問句正確形式
mc_exercises.question_eng: _______ you use to study in the library when you were in college?
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 C。過去習慣的疑問句結構為 Did + S + use to + V（原形）。A 與 D 為現在式，B 為 be 動詞過去式但不用於此句型。只有 Did 才能正確構成 used to 的疑問句，後接原形 use to。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 區別 used to 與 be used to 的語法用法
mc_exercises.question_eng: My grandfather _______ drink coffee every morning, but now he's _______ tea instead.
mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 D。前半句用 used to + 動詞原形表過去習慣已改變；後半句用 be used to + -ing 表現在已習慣某事。A 項第二空漏掉 be 動詞。B 項前半句文法錯誤。C 項第二空缺少 be 動詞，無法表達「已習慣」之意。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 綜合判斷過去習慣的否定與意義區分
mc_exercises.question_eng: He _______ smoking, so he was able to quit easily. However, his brother _______ smoking every day, but he's trying to break the habit now.

options.text: wasn't used to / is used to
didn't use to / is used to

mc_exercises.explanation: 正確答案是 A。第一句強調他過去「沒有」抽煙習慣，所以戒煙容易，需用 didn't use to。第二句表其兄弟過去有抽煙習慣但現在想戒，需用 used to。B 項邏輯相反。C 與 D 混用了 be used to 的現在式，無法表達過去習慣語義。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 我小時候經常看卡通，但現在不看了。
translation_exercises.answer: I used to watch cartoons when I was a child, but I don't watch them anymore.
key_points: when I was a child（時間對比）
but I don't watch them anymore（突顯現在已改變）
hints: 提示1：used to 後接原形動詞，表示過去經常做但現在不做的事
提示2：避免寫成 I used to watching cartoons；需搭配過去時間副詞強調對比

translation_exercises.answer: Did you use to exercise every day?
key_points: Did + S + use to + V（疑問句結構）
hints: 提示1：疑問句使用 Did you use to...，用 did 輔助動詞，use to 後接原形動詞
提示2：注意不能寫成 Did you used to...，use 不加-d

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 他上國中時經常和朋友在公園玩，可是現在因為功課忙就很少去了。
translation_exercises.answer: He used to play with his friends in the park when he was in junior high school, but he rarely goes there now because he is busy with schoolwork.
key_points: when he was in junior high school（明確時間背景）
but he rarely goes there now（現在已改變的狀態）
hints: 提示1：used to 表達已停止的過去習慣，後面用 but 對比現在的改變
提示2：避免寫成 he used to play...and now he doesn't go；要用 but 明確對比，突顯習慣的改變

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 以前我媽媽不允許我玩電動，但現在她理解我更多了，所以我可以在週末適度遊玩。
translation_exercises.answer: My mother used not to allow me to play video games, but now she understands me better, so I can play them moderately on weekends.
key_points: used not to allow（否定形式，較正式用法）
allow + 人 + to V（容許結構）
but now...（時間對比與態度轉變）
hints: 提示1：used to 的否定可用 used not to（較正式）或 didn't use to，後接原形動詞；allow 後需加 to V
提示2：避免混淆 used to 與 be used to；此處強調過去習慣的改變，不是指現在已習慣某事物
